title: spiraea × microthyrsa
intro: Spiraea × microthyrsa, also known as Maybush or Dwarf Spirea, is a hybrid deciduous shrub that belongs to the rose family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Spiraea × microthyrsa are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in folk remedies to treat various health conditions, including colds, flu, and skin irritations.
